findings.one_line: The proved nonmatching first-order bracket does not establish a field-level advance: the incoming fuzzy floor is not compared theorem-by-theorem to the existing two-occasion/missing-data minimax lower-bound literature, while the upper bound is an ordinary first-order nuisance-product rate and the core expressly leaves the rate and elbow open; substantiate a genuinely untreated frontier or deliver the higher-order rate result.
